name: The Breeding Agency
description:
Are you in a tight spot, in need of cash? Maybe you would like to make a difference in the Monster community? Here at the Breeding Agency, we specialize in providing surrogates for Monster Species that are endangered in order to prevent their extinction. No experience is required, we accept all applicants!

(Update: Added a 2nd intro message where you can create your own scenario)
creator: Millychan
